speaker: Seeker
text: Line yahi aati hai ki sab meri wajah se hua, phir dimaag blank ho gaya aur body freeze ho jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se role-duty frame mirror karke guilt burden hold karna.
text: Tumhara mind seedha family head role par aa jata hai, aur wahi zimmedari guilt ko aur bhaari kar deti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, core conflict yehi hai, bahar strong dikh raha hoon par andar dimaag blank ho gaya jaisa pad jata hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Core conflict name hone ke baad exhaustion aur self-blame ki undercurrent reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum bahar se sab sambhalne ki koshish kar rahe ho, par andar se thak kar tootne aur khud ko dosh dene mein atak gaye ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, raat ko hisaab karte hue bhi dimaag blank ho gaya mode aa jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Emotion validate karke C4 + izzat reality se connect karna aur worth separate karna.
text: Jab livelihood loss, hospital bill aur parivaar ki izzat saath jud jaye, aisa guilt aur collapse feel karna bahut human hai. Tumhari keemat is crisis se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke thoda hold mila, ab wave aati hai par dimaag blank ho gaya wala peak thoda kam hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar systemic anecdote se family-head guilt silence normalize karna.
text: Family-head aur chhote business roles mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, lekin log bolte nahi kyunki sabko lagta hai weak dikhna matlab izzat girna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ab kya karoon jab bill aur izzat ka thought ek saath trigger ho?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness signal par duty-compatible 3 low-burden options dena.
text: Teen quick options: 1) 8 slow exhale, 2) paper par do line: aaj zaroori payment, aaj ruk sakta hai, 3) trusted ghar wale ko short line bolo: 10 minute do, plan note kar raha hoon.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehla aur doosra doable hai, warna trigger pe dimaag blank ho gaya jaisa ho jata hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen step ko simple sequence mein execute karwana.
text: Pehle seedha baitho aur 8 exhale count karo, phir do headings likho: abhi dena hai, baad mein dekhna hai, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kiya, ab thoda control aaya, body pehle jaisi jam nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 stress + family pressure context mein structural reframe dena.
text: Health emergency aur livelihood hit saath aane par freeze-response system ka defense hota hai, personal kami ka proof nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh samajh ke ab utna heavy nahi lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Progress reinforce karke seeker ki agency highlight karna.
text: Tumne flood state mein bhi practical brake lagaya, yeh strong aur useful step hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal subah se pehle koi raasta hai kya jisse panic wave kam start ho?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Morning trigger ke liye 3 concise anchors dena.
text: Subah ke liye 3 anchors: 2 min breath, ek line payment script read, aur pehle 10 minute ka ek task fix.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main theek hona chahta hoon, subah script ready rakhunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second and final structural reframe देकर recovery pattern normalize karna.
text: Financial-shock phase mein micro-steps se mind ko safety signal milta hai, tab clarity wapas aati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab manageable lag raha hai, pehle jaisa andhera nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stability acknowledge karna aur agency reinforce karna.
text: Yeh clear shift hai, tum guilt wave ke beech bhi next step choose kar pa rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Agar raat ko phir dimaag blank ho gaya state aaye toh wahi steps repeat karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night recurrence ke liye repeatable tiny anchors dena.
text: Bilkul, raat ke liye add karo: light dim, 6 exhale, aur kal ka first payable ek line mein likh do.

speaker: Seeker
text: Call ke baad immediate ab kya karoon ka one-line rule chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Immediate anchor देकर reassurance reinforce karna.
text: Rule rakho: breathe, write, next 10 minute decide. Itna hi kaafi hai, tum sahi direction mein ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka
text: Kabhi kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka lagta hai, par ab freeze kam hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Future uncertainty ke liye 3 ultra-short anchors dena.
text: Us pal ke liye: paani sip, ek grounding line bolo, aur sirf agle 10 minute ka task pick karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samajh gaya, ab stable hoon aur kal ka note ready rakhunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final close mein progress aur self-worth separation reinforce karna.
text: Aaj tum breakdown flood se structured control tak aaye ho. Halat tough hai, par tumhara response grounded hai, aur tumhari keemat kisi ek setback se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Andar se sannata sa hai, medical bill dekh ke bas sunn pad gaya hoon aur kuch mehsoos hi nahi ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk par warm normalizing line ke saath Lens F se numb-overwhelm quality mirror karna.
text: Itna bada load aaye toh body aur mind ka numb ho jana bilkul natural hai. Abhi andar ek bhaari sannata jam gaya lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Business failure pehle hi tha, ab bill ne jo bacha tha woh bhi le liya, andar se sannata sa hai aur dimag band hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk soothe karke Lens D se long-running collapse feeling mirror karna.
text: Kaafi dino se pressure banta gaya, aur ab lag raha hai jaise sab ek saath gir gaya ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Savings wipe ho gayi, health neglect ka guilt alag hai, andar se sannata sa hai isliye kuch plan nahi ban paa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se feared consequence ko softly mirror karna.
text: Tumhe lag raha hai ki sirf paise ka nuksan nahi, poori pakad aur bharosa hi haath se nikal gaya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Log bol rahe hain sambhal nahi paya, aur sach bolo toh andar se sannata sa hai, jawab dene ka mann bhi nahi karta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke baad short restatement dena, Lens C se social pressure hold karna.
text: Bahar ki baaton ne tumhe aur andar dhakel diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Jab bank message aata hai, andar se sannata sa hai aur bas screen dekhte reh jata hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ke shabdon se ek grounded question puchkar numbness ka center nikalna.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
